title: Attack on Dantooine (Galactic Civil War)

{{Quote|Dantooine is too remote for an effective demonstration, but we can make use of it nonetheless.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]]|<ref name="DA" />}}
The '''Attack on Dantooine''', also known as the '''Dantooine Massacre''', was an act of terror perpetrated by the Imperial warlord [[Natasi Daala|Admiral Daala]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against a newly-established colony on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

The colony was set up by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for the refugees of the hostile world [[Eol Sha]] when their leader, [[Gantoris]], joined [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice at Skywalker's newly-founded [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Dantooine was supposed to be a peaceful, out-of-the-way respite for those who had known only hardship for so long on their former home.

Admiral Daala learned of the refugees after intercepting a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] bound for Dantooine with supplies for them. Believing the Eol Sha settlement was a Republic base, Daala showed up with her three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyers]] just as the final touches were being applied to the colony. Upon arrival, she ordered the deployment of [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walkers, supported by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], to wipe out the camp, hoping to draw the attention of Republic reinforcements.

The attack took the outpost completely by surprise, and the Republic [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] in the settlement, working on setting up a communication center, managed only to fire a single shot from the base's small [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] before it was destroyed. All of the refugees were killed, along with a number of engineers.

Gantoris was shown a vision of the massacre by the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] prior to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice's death.
